The '''''Swiff''''' was a [[Dray-class transport|''Dray''-class transport]] that [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and his [[Marriage/Legends|wife]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], borrowed from their old friend [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. They used it in their disguises as [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] Rysto and Syrule at the [[Lizil (Hive)|Lizil]] [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] [[Lizil|nest]] during the [[Swarm War]]. They were attempting to track down the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] turned [[Joiner]]s [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Zekk]], and bring them back from the front lines of the war. Han Solo saw two black [[Fefze]] waving their arms at the [[vidcam]] in an attempt to be let into the ship, but they turned out to be the [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]–turned–[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Spy/Legends|spies]] [[Jae Juun]] and [[Tarfang]] in disguise. The [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] and [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]], respectively, were there to warn Han and Leia that the [[Squib/Legends|Squibs]] [[Emala]], [[Grees]], and [[Sligh]] had put a one thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] [[Death mark/Legends|death mark]] on each of their heads despite the deal they had made.<ref name="DNIII: TJK" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Swiff''{{'s}} first and only appearance was in ''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'', which was written by [[Troy Denning]] and released on [[December 27]], [[2005]].

*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1st}}
